title: Copeca Task
description: A benchmark task — YAML data, never embedded code.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this task measures.

source.description: Provenance reference — which source benchmark this task derives from, with license.

repo.description: Repository key — must match an entry in repos.yaml.

commit.description: Optional git commit SHA to pin this task's worktree at, overriding repos.yaml — lets one repo serve tasks authored against different code states.

category.description: Capability axis (orthogonal to type): locate (report one named thing), trace (map a cross-file relationship), fix (change code until a test passes), debug (diagnose via git history then resolve/explain), reason (comprehend given code with no navigation).

control.description: Tool-neutrality control (#52): true marks a non-regression task where a codebase tool should not help (answer-in-context / single-file / pure reasoning). Orthogonal to category.

language.description: Primary programming language of the target repository.

difficulty.description: Author-declared difficulty, used for reporting aggregation.

prompt.description: The prompt sent to the CLI coding agent.

required_strings.description: Strings that must ALL appear (case-insensitive substring) in the agent's response.

all_of.description: Completeness: EVERY entry in this list must appear in the response.

forbidden_strings.description: Strings that must NONE appear in the response.

test_command.description: Shell command; exit 0 means the fix is correct. Required for edit tasks.

mutations.description: Code mutations to apply before the agent runs (edit tasks).

mutation_sequence.description: Ordered commit steps for debug tasks — each step applies mutations then commits them, building real git history for the agent to navigate.

message.description: Git commit message for this step.
